在这里，拥有超凡力量的觉醒者是人上人。
可陆望舒穿越的身体只是个普通人，而且还是个父母双亡，一穷二白却肩负抚养御兽师妹妹的苦命人。
为了今后的生活，陆望舒只能重新接手父母留下的宠兽店。
直到这时，一道陌生的声音自他脑海中响起。
“欢迎使用神级御兽系统！”
自此，一个名为御神的宠兽店轰然崛起。
陆望舒：
“神？”
“神不也是人造出来的吗？”
“只要来到我的宠兽店，就算是路边野狗也能成神！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o9b4685d3281ab5d05bf3f7d233e395cc~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"棒打鲜脑花","author_id":"","book_id":"7434461708023778329","book_name":"御神宠兽店","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#405068","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7434461768706966041","read_count":"413","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"205371"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"99","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,穿越,无女主,都市异能","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/d0008d2f9a79640f3b54650c29166f54~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779398132&x-signature=Dr6I9PcuzLLWwfkzH7ZWhBMbvzo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2436127517850759","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"47"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323051532A35055B69B3D5E759624"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读35分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarde
